description.value:
It's a statuette of you!

This is used as the material component for the @UUID[Compendium.elkan5e.elkan5e-spells.Item.LIRYUDLP7NTEL0QF]{Contingency} spell, which cannot be cast unless this component is carried by the caster.

This component can be used for the casting of the Contingency spell as many times as you like.
